title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature and autonomous coding capabilities, comparing progress to Ralph-loop 2.0. The video covers how goal-setting features work in coding assistants, setup methods, and long-horizon task execution through /Mission exploration.
